findings: ❌ CustomerService had NO tenant filtering - FIXED
❌ create_customer() did not set tenant_id - FIXED
❌ list_customers() did not filter by tenant_id - FIXED
❌ get_customer() did not verify tenant ownership - FIXED
❌ update_customer() did not verify tenant ownership - FIXED
❌ delete_customer() did not verify tenant ownership - FIXED
❌ search_customers() did not filter by tenant_id - FIXED

changes: All methods now accept tenant_id parameter (default 0 for backward compat)
tenant_id passed to Customer() constructor on create
list_customers() filters by tenant_id when tenant_id > 0
get/update/delete operations verify tenant_id matches customer.tenant_id
Fixed status field to use CustomerStatus enum properly
